narrative:
Paulding County has 12,117 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants.
